     The Numbers Business Report

The Apprentice (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $4,001,910Details
International Box Office $5,158,254
Worldwide Box Office $9,160,164
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A dive into the underbelly of the American empire. It charts a young Donald Trump’s ascent to power through a Faustian deal with the influential right-wing lawyer and political fixer Roy Cohn.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,613,233 (40.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.48 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,740 opening theaters/1,740 max. theaters, 1.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $4,231,902

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 11th, 2024 (Wide) by Briarcliff Entertainment
International Releases: October 9th, 2024 (Limited) (France)
October 10th, 2024 (Limited) (Australia)
October 10th, 2024 (Limited) (New Zealand)
October 11th, 2024 (Limited), released as The Apprentice. La Historia de Trump (Spain)
October 11th, 2024 (Limited) (Finland)
Video Release: November 1st, 2024 by Briarcliffe Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for sexual content, some graphic nudity, language, sexual assault, and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2852 (cert #55102), 9/18/2024)
Running Time: 120 minutes
Filming location (country): Canada
Geographical setting: New York City
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Land Developer, Political
Subgenre: Biographical Drama
Time period setting: 1970s, 1980s
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Kinematics, Head Gear Films, Screen Ireland, Film i Vast, Danish Film Institute, National Bank of Canada, Scythia Films, Profile Pictures, Tailored Films , National Film Institute, Rich Spirit, Baer Development, Gidden Media, Rocket Science, Metrol Technology
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
